AppointmentId.description: A unique ID for the appointment.

EndDateTime.description:
The end date and time of the new appointment.
Default: **StartDateTime**, offset by the staff member’s default appointment duration.

Execute.description: The action taken to add this appointment. Possible values are: confirm, unconfirm, arrive, unarrive, cancel, latecancel, complete.

GenderPreference.description: The client’s service provider gender preference.

Notes.description: Any general notes about this appointment.
Notes.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

PartnerExternalId.description: Optional external key for api partners.

ProviderId.description: If a user has Complementary and Alternative Medicine features enabled, this parameter assigns a provider ID to the appointment.

ResourceIds.description: A list of resource IDs to associate with the new appointment.

SendEmail.description:
Whether to send client an email for cancellations. An email is sent only if the client has an email address and automatic emails have been set up.
Default: **false**

SessionTypeId.description: The session type associated with the new appointment.

StaffId.description: The ID of the staff member who is adding the new appointment.

StartDateTime.description: The start date and time of the new appointment.

ApplyPayment.description:
When `true`, appointment will be updated with a current applicable client service from the clients account.
Default: **false**

Test.description:
When `true`, indicates that the method is to be validated, but no new appointment data is added.
Default: **false**
